title: Inbox notifications not clearing after read them all and refresh my page
excerpt: I am clearing all of my inbox notifications (Going through every filter and closing all notifications). Then when I refresh my page, the notifications re-populate. Any reason for this?

posts.author: jcammarato (Joe Cammarato)
posts.cookedHtml: I am clearing all of my inbox notifications (Going through every filter and closing all notifications). Then when I refresh my page, the notifications re-populate. Any reason for this?

posts.author: cherylbenke (Cheryl Benkert)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team is having the same issue.
